name: Honey Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons brandy (add more if children are absent)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the egg yolks and place them in a bowl. Add honey, sugar, lukewarm coffee, oil, and brandy. Stir with a wooden spoon until well combined. Add cinnamon, ground cloves, and ground ginger, stirring until evenly incorporated.
2. In another bowl, mix together flour, baking powder, and baking soda. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined. Fold in crushed walnuts or pecans.
3. Beat egg whites with a mixer until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
4. Grease an 8-inch loaf pan with margarine. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle almonds on top. Bake in a preheated oven at medium temperature for one hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
